sentences.arabic: زَارَ فَرِيقُ الْهِلَالِ الأَحْمَرِ مَدْرَسَةَ الْحَيِّ.
sentences.translation: Tim Crvenog polumjeseca posjetio je školu u kvartu.
sentences.translationEn: The Red Crescent team visited the neighborhood school.

sentences.arabic: عَلَّمَ الْفَرِيقُ الطُّلَّابَ الإِسْعَافَاتِ الأَوَّلِيَّةَ الْبَسِيطَةَ.
sentences.translation: Tim je naučio učenike jednostavnoj prvoj pomoći.
sentences.translationEn: The team taught the students simple first aid.

sentences.arabic: تَدَرَّبَ الطُّلَّابُ عَلَى رِعَايَةِ الْجُرُوحِ الصَّغِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su se vježbali u zbrinjavanju manjih rana.
sentences.translationEn: The students practiced caring for small wounds.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الطُّلَّابُ إِنَّهُمْ تَعَلَّمُوا أَشْيَاءَ مُفِيدَةً جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Učenici su rekli da su naučili veoma korisne stvari.
sentences.translationEn: The students said they learned very useful things.
